title: Can Companies Embrace A.I. Without Layoffs? This One Says It Is Trying to.
summary_full: The German software giant SAP says it is betting that employees can reinvent jobs instead of eliminating them. Experts are divided on whether it will work.
summary_public: The German software giant SAP says it is betting that employees can reinvent jobs instead of eliminating them. Experts are divided on whether it will work.

DE.label: positive
DE.evidence: The German software giant SAP says it is betting
